positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with session established
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements are correctly rendered and accessible before any interaction
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed
Verify the username/email input field is present and visible
Verify the password input field is present and visible
Verify the password field masks input characters
Verify the Login/Submit button is present and enabled
Verify any 'Forgot Password' link is visible
Verify any 'Sign Up' or registration link is visible
positive_scenarios.title: Login page renders all required UI elements correctly

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation errors are displayed for both empty fields; login does not proceed and no API call is made
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed for both fields (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An authentication error message is displayed; the user remains on the login page and access is denied
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid username or password' or 'Incorrect credentials'
Verify the password field is cleared or highlighted
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password
